tasks.description: Step detail panel 'Tools' section (dropdown selector + badges, same pattern as role assignment) + tool cost integration into step cost computation
acceptance_criteria: Step detail panel has 'Assigned Tools' section below 'Assigned Roles' section
Dropdown selector lists all workspace tools (fetched via fetchTools), excluding already-assigned tools
Assigned tools shown as badges with X remove button (matching role assignment pattern exactly)
Clicking add assigns tool via createStepTool, clicking X removes via deleteStepTool
Tool badges show tool name and optionally cost_per_month
Cost computation section (lines 384-404) shows tool cost contribution: sum of assigned tools' cost_per_month
Total step monthly cost = labor cost + tool cost (displayed separately)

similar_files: src/components/panels/step-detail-panel.tsx (Assigned Roles section, lines 282-340 — EXACT pattern to follow)
patterns_to_follow: Role assignment pattern: fetchStepRoles → state → assignedRoleIds Set → dropdown exclude assigned → createStepRole/deleteStepRole → update state
Tool fetch: fetchStepToolsByStep(step.id) for assigned, fetchTools(workspaceId) for dropdown options
Client wrappers already exist: fetchStepToolsByStep, createStepTool, deleteStepTool (client.ts lines 361-379)
Cost section lines 384-404: monthly labor cost from roles. Add tool cost below: sum stepTools.map(st => st.tool.cost_per_month ?? 0)
learnings_relevant: React 19 useRef requires initial value: useRef(undefined) not bare useRef()
apiFetch unwraps envelope — client functions return T directly
Never sort prop arrays directly — use [...arr].sort()

tasks.special_instructions: IMPORTANT: FEAT-041 [2/3] was already completed in iteration 117 — migration 024_step_tools.sql, StepTool type, API routes (step-tools/route.ts + [id]/route.ts), client wrappers (fetchStepToolsByStep, createStepTool, deleteStepTool, StepToolWithTool), and 'Step Usage' section in tool-detail-panel.tsx ALL EXIST. Do NOT recreate any of these. This task ONLY adds the 'Assigned Tools' section to step-detail-panel.tsx + cost integration. The Tool type only has cost_per_month (no cost_type/renewal_date fields). Use cost_per_month as-is for cost integration. Also need to fetch all workspace tools for the dropdown — check client.ts for fetchTools function. Icon suggestion: Wrench from lucide-react.

tasks.description: Tool status dropdown optimistic update — add local status state initialized from tool.status, update immediately on change, revert on API error
acceptance_criteria: Status dropdown uses local state instead of tool.status prop directly
Local state resets when tool.id changes (useEffect pattern matching name/category/vendor/url/costPerMonth)
Dropdown change updates local state immediately (optimistic)
On API error, reverts local state to previous value and shows toast error

patterns_to_follow: Existing tool-detail-panel already uses local state for name/category/vendor/url/costPerMonth with useEffect reset on tool.id change (lines 47-70). Add status to same pattern.
Status dropdown currently at line 170: value={tool.status} — change to value={status} with local state

tasks.special_instructions: Small change. Add const [status, setStatus] = React.useState(tool.status) at line ~47. Add tool.status to the useEffect deps at line 64-70 with setStatus(tool.status). Change select value from tool.status to status. On change, setStatus immediately then call handleFieldUpdate. On error in handleFieldUpdate, revert. Note: handleFieldUpdate currently doesn't distinguish success/failure for the caller — may need to restructure the status change to handle error case inline (try/catch around updateTool with revert in catch).

tasks.description: Tool section detail panel — show count of tools in the selected section as a read-only summary
acceptance_criteria: Tool section detail panel shows 'N tools' count in header area or below name field
Count is passed as optional toolCount prop from tools-canvas-view.tsx
tools-canvas-view.tsx computes count from tools array filtered by tool_section_id
Count updates when tools are added/removed from the section

similar_files: src/components/panels/section-detail-panel.tsx (section panels show task rollup — similar concept)
patterns_to_follow: tool-section-detail-panel.tsx is 143 lines — add optional toolCount?: number prop
tools-canvas-view.tsx already has tools state array — filter by tool_section_id matching selected section

tasks.special_instructions: Small change. In tools-canvas-view.tsx, when rendering ToolSectionDetailPanel, compute toolCount = tools.filter(t => t.tool_section_id === selectedSection.id).length and pass as prop. In tool-section-detail-panel.tsx, add optional toolCount prop and display below name or in header as muted text like '3 tools' or '0 tools'.

shared_files.note: database.ts and client.ts are read-only for all slots. No new types or client wrappers needed — all step_tools infrastructure already exists.
